entries.text: Metallic inks on printed labels raise the Ti background enough to mask Ti-adjacent lines. Ask about ink chemistry at intake.
Recycled PET carries a variable Sb background from the polymerization catalyst. Treat Sb as conditional on any rPET component.
Barium salt entries in Annex II hinge on solubility class. Route every Ba candidate to the R.E. rather than auto-clearing it.
